allow: PowerShell(Start-Process npm -ArgumentList 'run','preview' -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:4321/' -UseBasicParsing\).StatusCode } catch { $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell($ok=$false; for\($i=0;$i -lt 15;$i++\){ try { $r=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:4321/' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3; Write-Output "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $ok=$true; break } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800 } }; if\(-not $ok\){ Write-Output 'no response yet' })
